title: 2024910Wet 87W385
summary:
Main
• Sentiment Improves as Signs of Early Recovery Develop - VLCC owners have made some progress in the first week of September, buoyed by renewed market optimism and hints of recovery after a prolonged downturn. The AG VLCC market, which had experienced a sharp drop in rates to yearly lows, is now seeing encouraging signs of a turnaround. Owners demonstrated strong resistance after a sluggish start to the week, with several market-quoted cargoes receiving fewer offers than expected as rates appeared to bottom out.
